title: Psycho Glint
description:
Epilepsy Warning!
Contains bright moving images.
body:
# Psycho Glint

Minecraft's enchantment glint can be a bit bland, purple on purple, no variation.
Fortunate for you: this pack fixes that!

Now rather than the bland origonal glint, installing this pack will mix in a wide variety of colours into your enchanted items and armour.

How was this made?
By using a Image editing software, and rendering turbulence onto a black canvas: this effect was created.

Also: for anyone wanting a custom pack made for them; also send a dm to Lime_void on the Imortals Packs discord with your specific suggestion, your reason (if you have one) and a colour pallet if you want, a size, a name (optional) and what mod (or base minecraft) it should be for within.
